test.command: No test command is defined in .factory/services.yaml or package.json

blockingIssues.description: Business sidebar/nav is missing a direct link to `/business/profile`, so portal navigation is incomplete versus the feature contract.

appliedUpdates.description: Documented compensation enum/type drift between `src/lib/supabase.ts` and active API/UI values in `.factory/library/architecture.md`.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Align fullstack-worker verification procedure with actual mission expectations by clarifying whether lint is mandatory in every feature run and enforcing consistent handoff reporting.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: ux-opportunity-form, ux-navigation-guidance, and cross-flow-verification reviews all observed `followedProcedure=true` with no `npm run lint` execution despite skill text requiring lint.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Define per-portal 'key page' navigation minimums (for example, requiring `/business/profile` in business primary nav) to make nav-completeness requirements explicit and testable.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: ux-navigation-guidance failed because `/business/profile` remained outside the business sidebar despite the feature requiring key-page nav completeness.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Resolve convention drift around `no any` by either enforcing it in lint configuration or revising mission convention wording to match current lint policy.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: ux-opportunity-form review found new `as any` casts while mission AGENTS still states `No any types`.

rejectedObservations.observation: The docs-cleanup transcript did not show a read of `.factory/library/architecture.md` despite skill step guidance.
rejectedObservations.reason: Rejected for shared-state update because it is an execution-evidence gap, not durable codebase knowledge or operational config.

rejectedObservations.observation: Repeated lint-procedure mismatch observations across multiple review reports.
